content: Release checkpoint: public GitHub v0.1.1 release is done. Created a sanitized public commit on origin/main (bb9cf950f86580874021f3007d3224f8cebaf740) excluding .aof/docs-aof/.claude internals, pushed origin/main, created/pushed annotated tag v0.1.1, and created GitHub Release https://github.com/ai-org-labs/archmap/releases/tag/v0.1.1. Verification: npm test passed (188 tests), npm pack --dry-run passed for @archmap/core@0.1.1, remote main/tag/release metadata verified, dev server restarted and is visible at http://127.0.0.1:5173/. Human-owned remaining step: run npm publish --access public, then verify npm view @archmap/core@0.1.1 and jsDelivr URLs for dist/archmap.js, dist/controls/diagram-tags.js, and dist/views3d/three-view.js.
